description_long: This object is a Nikon digital single-lens reflex (DSLR) camera, featuring a prominent black body with a textured grip and a detachable zoom lens. The front displays the Nikon logo above the lens mount, with a red accent on the grip and a large lens barrel marked with focal length indicators. The top section includes a mode dial, shutter button, and a pop-up flash unit. The rear side is equipped with a large LCD screen, multiple control buttons, and a viewfinder, providing comprehensive manual and automatic controls. The lens is marked with VR (Vibration Reduction) and focal length numbers, indicating its zoom capability. The overall design is robust and ergonomic, suitable for handheld photography in urban environments.
description: A black Nikon DSLR camera with a detachable zoom lens, textured grip, and detailed control interface. Features include a pop-up flash, LCD screen, and prominent branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Nikon logo, lens barrel, red grip accent, and pop-up flash.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the extended zoom lens, VR markings, and the open pop-up flash.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the LCD screen, control buttons, viewfinder, and mode dial.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the lens barrel, grip, and part of the control interface.
